description: Recto: Legal fragment involving Halil (?) al-Shayzari ha-Bursi and Yishaq and various sums of money. Verso: possibly a Judaeo-Arabic draft of a sermon (?); words are written between the lines and squeezed into the margins.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
